class.name: FmodAudioEffectEQ21
class.description: FmodAudioEffectEQ21 is a 21-band graphic equalizer using FMOD's MULTIBAND_EQ DSP. It provides professional-grade frequency equalization across twenty-one bands spanning from 22Hz to 22000Hz. Each band can be individually adjusted for gain (-60 dB to +24 dB), frequency, Q value, and filter type. By default, all bands use peaking filters with a Q value of 0.707. The frequency bands are: 22Hz, 32Hz, 44Hz, 63Hz, 90Hz, 125Hz, 175Hz, 250Hz, 350Hz, 500Hz, 700Hz, 1000Hz, 1400Hz, 2000Hz, 2800Hz, 4000Hz, 5600Hz, 8000Hz, 11000Hz, 16000Hz, and 22000Hz. [b]Note:[/b] This equalizer uses multiple MULTIBAND_EQ DSP units internally (each supports 5 bands). For simpler control, use [FmodAudioEffectEQ6] or [FmodAudioEffectEQ10].

members.member: The preset is fixed to [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.PRESET_21_BANDS] for this class.
Gain for the first band (22Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the first band in Hz.
Q value for the first band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the first band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the second band (32Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the second band in Hz.
Q value for the second band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the second band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the third band (44Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the third band in Hz.
Q value for the third band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the third band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the fourth band (63Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the fourth band in Hz.
Q value for the fourth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the fourth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the fifth band (90Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the fifth band in Hz.
Q value for the fifth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the fifth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the sixth band (125Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the sixth band in Hz.
Q value for the sixth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the sixth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the seventh band (175Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the seventh band in Hz.
Q value for the seventh band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the seventh band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the eighth band (250Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the eighth band in Hz.
Q value for the eighth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the eighth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the ninth band (350Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the ninth band in Hz.
Q value for the ninth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the ninth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the tenth band (500Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the tenth band in Hz.
Q value for the tenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the tenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the eleventh band (700Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the eleventh band in Hz.
Q value for the eleventh band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the eleventh band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the twelfth band (1000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the twelfth band in Hz.
Q value for the twelfth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the twelfth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the thirteenth band (1400Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the thirteenth band in Hz.
Q value for the thirteenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the thirteenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the fourteenth band (2000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the fourteenth band in Hz.
Q value for the fourteenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the fourteenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the fifteenth band (2800Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the fifteenth band in Hz.
Q value for the fifteenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the fifteenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the sixteenth band (4000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the sixteenth band in Hz.
Q value for the sixteenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the sixteenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the seventeenth band (5600Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the seventeenth band in Hz.
Q value for the seventeenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the seventeenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the eighteenth band (8000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the eighteenth band in Hz.
Q value for the eighteenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the eighteenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the nineteenth band (11000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the nineteenth band in Hz.
Q value for the nineteenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the nineteenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the twentieth band (16000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the twentieth band in Hz.
Q value for the twentieth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the twentieth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the twenty-first band (22000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the twenty-first band in Hz.
Q value for the twenty-first band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the twenty-first band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
